Container.Name: oneoneseven
Container.Overview: Ephemeral encrypted one-time object store. Objects are encrypted with AES-256-GCM, retrievable exactly once via a secret URL, and automatically expire.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port the web UI and API are served on.

Config.Name: Listen Address
Config.Description: Address and port the server binds to inside the container. Must match the container port above.

Config.Name: Max Object Size (bytes)
Config.Description: Maximum size in bytes of a single stored object.

Config.Name: Max Objects
Config.Description: Maximum number of objects that may be held in storage at once.

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Requests
Config.Description: Maximum number of concurrent requests allowed at any moment.

Config.Name: Max Object Age (seconds)
Config.Description: Maximum age of a stored object in seconds before it is pruned. Default is 3600 (1 hour).

Config.Name: Pruner Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: Interval in seconds between pruner runs.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity. Options: error, warn, info, debug, trace.
